profile.bio: Marketplace-hosted Google Places scraping powered by Apify.

service.name: Google Places Scraper
service.tagline: Run Apify Google Places scraping through a Fast-native async proxy.
service.about: Google Places Scraper starts the Apify Google Places actor through a marketplace-hosted async wrapper. Buyers pay on Fast and retrieve the completed dataset through the marketplace job flow.
service.promptIntro: I want to use the Google Places Scraper service on Fast Marketplace.
setupInstructions: Fund a Fast wallet on mainnet.
Call the paid run route with your actor input.
Keep the returned job token and poll the marketplace job route for completion.

endpoints.title: Run Scraper
endpoints.description: Start an async Google Places scraping job through the Apify wrapper.
endpoints.usageNotes: The marketplace returns a job token immediately and stores the completed actor output on the job record.
